title: goniopteris lineata
intro: Goniopteris lineata, also known as the narrow-leaved or lineated fern, is a species of plant in the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to exhibit potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving skin health. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments. In some parts of the world, Goniopteris lineata is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
